fairy.name: Fairy
fairy.title: The Woodland Sprite
fairy.description: A delicate woodland sprite that flutters through enchanted forests leaving trails of glowing dust.

evolution.description: The Fairy stopped fluttering and put down roots. Literally.

encounter_situations: A Fairy is caught mid-weave, threading light between two branches like it's sewing something only it can see. It stops when it notices you.
The Fairy is sitting very still on a mushroom cap, apparently listening to the tree above it. The tree is not, as far as you can tell, saying anything.
You nearly step on it. The Fairy does not move. It looks up at you with an expression that suggests this happens to it a lot.

pixie.name: Pixie
pixie.title: The Mischief Maker
pixie.description: A tiny trickster that delights in causing harmless chaos with its innate magical abilities.
encounter_situations: A Pixie has rearranged every stone on the path into a pattern that you can't quite make sense of. It looks pleased with itself.
The Pixie is hovering directly in front of your face before you even notice it's there. It appears to have been waiting.
Something small has been moving your supplies when you weren't watching. You catch the Pixie in the middle of putting everything back slightly wrong.

goblin.name: Goblin
goblin.title: The Scrappy Brawler
goblin.description: A stout and scrappy fighter who compensates for lack of grace with sheer stubbornness.

evolution.description: This Goblin has been lifting things too heavy for a Goblin. Something shifted.

encounter_situations: A Goblin is arguing loudly with a rock. The rock is not responding, which does not seem to be slowing the Goblin down.
The Goblin sees you and immediately crosses its arms. It does not attack. It simply stares, communicating a great deal of skepticism.
You hear the Goblin before you see it — the sound of something small and determined crashing through underbrush that is too large for it.

imp.name: Imp
imp.title: The Shadow Gremlin
imp.description: A cunning shadow gremlin that strikes from darkness and vanishes before retaliation.

evolution.description: The Imp found a second face. Then a third. The Loom considers this perfectly normal.

encounter_situations: Something small is following you through the darkness. When you stop, it stops. When you look, there's nothing. Then the Imp materializes beside you.
The Imp was inside your shadow. This is not supposed to be possible. The Imp seems aware that it isn't supposed to be possible and does it anyway.
A small voice says something from somewhere you can't locate. The Imp is crouching on a surface that has no obvious reason to be climbable.

slime.name: Slime
slime.title: The Gooey Guardian
slime.description: A remarkably resilient blob that absorbs damage like a sponge and bounces back from almost anything.

evolution.description: Something about this particular Slime has always been different. The Loom knows.

encounter_situations: The Slime has accumulated a faint bioluminescence down here, absorbing the light from thermal vents. It pulses softly when you approach.
Something is absorbing the pressure down here in a way that makes no sense for something without bones. The Slime seems fine with this.
The Slime is adhered to the underside of a rock shelf, suspended above you. It detaches when you notice it.

kitsune_1.name: Kitsune
kitsune_1.title: The Young Fox Spirit
kitsune_1.description: A young fox spirit with 1-3 tails, still mastering its innate magical abilities.

evolution.description: Kitsune has mastered its first form. The other eight tails are waiting.

encounter_situations: You catch a glimpse of a single white tail vanishing around a tree. When you follow, the Kitsune is standing there as if it has always been standing there.
The Kitsune is sitting on a stump, looking at something you can't see. It glances at you sideways. Its one tail flicks once.
A young Kitsune is practicing something — a small conjured light, fading in and out. It goes out entirely when it realizes it has an audience.

dryad.name: Dryad
dryad.title: The Forest Keeper
dryad.description: A guardian spirit of the ancient forest, drawing power from the roots of thousand-year-old trees.
encounter_situations: The Dryad is so still it takes you a moment to realize it isn't a tree. Then it blinks, slowly.
Leaves are moving in a pattern that doesn't match the wind. At the center of the pattern: a Dryad, conducting something only it can hear.
The Dryad emerges from the bark of a very old tree like it's stepping through a doorway. It looks at you the way trees look at things — long and patient and not especially impressed.

hellhound.name: Hellhound
hellhound.title: The Infernal Hound
hellhound.description: A fearsome hound wreathed in smokeless flame whose howl echoes across dimensions.

evolution.description: The Hellhound ran further north than it should have. Something there agreed with it.

encounter_situations: The Hellhound is lying on a flat rock, eyes closed, absorbing heat. It opens one eye when your footsteps change the temperature of the air around it.
Smoke curls from where the Hellhound has been sitting. It stands when it notices you, and the ground where it was is slightly glassy.
The Hellhound materializes from a plume of smoke the way a shape materializes from fog — gradually, then all at once.

harpy.name: Harpy
harpy.title: The Storm Screamer
harpy.description: A fierce winged creature whose piercing cry can shatter stone and summon violent storms.

evolution.description: The Harpy found a storm it couldn't outfly, so it became it instead.

encounter_situations: The Harpy lands on a spire of rock above you and watches. It tilts its head. It does not attack. It seems to be making a decision.
A screech overhead. The Harpy is circling something — you, apparently — in long, considering arcs. It lands when it decides you're interesting enough.
The Harpy is perched on the highest point of whatever it can find, watching the sky. It glances down at you the way things that fly look at things that can't.

unicorn.name: Unicorn
unicorn.title: The Sacred Steed
unicorn.description: A magnificent creature of pure light whose horn holds the power to heal any wound.

evolution.description: The Unicorn touched something it shouldn't have been able to touch. The Loom is not surprised.

encounter_situations: The Unicorn is standing in the only shaft of real light in the Celestial Loom, as if it arranged this. It probably did.
You find the Unicorn at the moment a strand of the Loom passes close enough to touch. The Unicorn doesn't touch it. It's waiting for something.
The Unicorn turns toward you slowly, horn first. It doesn't seem alarmed. It seems like it's been expecting someone, and you'll do.

pegasus.name: Pegasus
pegasus.title: The Sky Stallion
pegasus.description: A winged stallion born from storm clouds whose speed rivals lightning itself.

evolution.description: The Pegasus flew so high it found the edge of the world. Then it found what was beyond it.

encounter_situations: The Pegasus touches down in a rush of displaced hot air, folding its wings with the practiced efficiency of something that has landed in worse places.
You see the Pegasus before it sees you — a silhouette against the orange sky, descending in a long spiral that suggests it has chosen this landing spot deliberately.
The Pegasus is standing completely still in the Wastes, its mane moving in a wind you can't feel. It turns when you approach.

griffin.name: Griffin
griffin.title: The Noble Guardian
griffin.description: A majestic beast with the body of a lion and wings of an eagle, guardian of ancient treasures.
encounter_situations: The Griffin is cleaning its beak on a rock. It stops when it notices you and assumes a posture that suggests it was definitely doing something more dignified than that.
A Griffin lands between you and the path ahead and sits down. It appears to have no particular agenda. It simply wants to be in that spot.
You find the Griffin at a convergence of heat vents, standing in rising warm air with its wings half-spread. It looks extremely comfortable.

basilisk.name: Basilisk
basilisk.title: The Stone Gaze
basilisk.description: A serpentine terror whose gaze turns living creatures to stone and whose breath withers crops.
encounter_situations: The Basilisk is lying across the path in a shaft of sunlight, eyes half-closed. It opens one eye when you approach. The eye is amber and very old.
You find the Basilisk when everything ahead of you on the path goes quiet. It is already looking at you.
The Basilisk has turned three small stones and one unlucky beetle to a mineral state. It is contemplating a fourth when you arrive.

cerberus.name: Cerberus
cerberus.title: The Three-Headed Guardian
cerberus.description: The three-headed hound of the underworld, each head embodying a different aspect of fear.
encounter_situations: Three heads, one body, one argument. The Cerberus's three heads are disagreeing about something. Two of them notice you. The third is still making its point.
A Cerberus is sitting very properly in the middle of the path, like it is guarding something. There is nothing to guard. It doesn't move.
The sound of overlapping growls reaches you before the Cerberus does — each head maintaining its own distinct vocal register.

wyvern.name: Wyvern
wyvern.title: The Venomous Flier
wyvern.description: A two-legged dragon cousin whose tail stinger drips with the most potent venom in existence.

evolution.description: The Wyvern finally grew its front legs. This took longer than expected.

encounter_situations: The Wyvern is between you and the sky, a silhouette dropping fast. It pulls up at the last moment and lands hard, sending a wave of heat outward.
A Wyvern is resting on a lava shelf, tail trailing in the cooling rock. It lifts its head when you approach, measuring you.
The Wyvern has clearly just eaten. It is lying on its back in an undignified sprawl. It rights itself quickly when it notices you, attempting to look threatening.

phoenix.name: Phoenix
phoenix.title: The Eternal Flame
phoenix.description: An immortal bird of flame that dies and is reborn from its own ashes, carrying the warmth of the sun.
encounter_situations: The Phoenix is in the middle of burning. This is apparently a normal Tuesday for it. The fire dies down as you approach, leaving it looking mildly inconvenienced.
You find the Phoenix at the center of a ring of ash it has made of itself at some point. It blinks at you from the ash, already regrowing.
The Phoenix is perched on a thermal column of hot air, barely moving, watching the horizon. It descends slowly when it decides you deserve its attention.

thunderbird.name: Thunderbird
thunderbird.title: The Storm Sovereign
thunderbird.description: A colossal bird whose wingbeats create hurricanes and whose eyes flash with living lightning.
encounter_situations: Lightning strikes somewhere behind you. The Thunderbird lands in the aftermath, trailing ozone, looking like it arranged all of this on purpose.
The Thunderbird is larger than you were expecting. It is also closer than you were expecting. It fixes you with a gaze that crackles.
A Thunderbird is riding the thermal columns above the Wastes in long, slow spirals. It breaks out of its orbit and comes down when it notices you.

sphinx.name: Sphinx
sphinx.title: The Riddler of Ages
sphinx.description: An ancient guardian of forbidden knowledge who destroys those who cannot answer its riddles.
encounter_situations: The Sphinx is waiting. It has been waiting, you suspect, since considerably before you arrived. It watches you approach with the patience of something that has asked this question before.
A Sphinx blocks the path, not threateningly — it simply hasn't moved since it sat down and the path was built around it. It looks at you with mild curiosity.
The Sphinx has arranged a row of stones in front of it. Whether this is a game or a trap or simply something to do, it doesn't say.

yeti.name: Yeti
yeti.title: The Abominable One
yeti.description: A towering beast of ice and fury that rules the highest, most inhospitable mountain peaks.
encounter_situations: The Yeti is sitting in the middle of a glacial field, doing nothing in particular, in the particular way that very large things do nothing — by taking up a significant amount of space.
You find the Yeti by the depression it has made sitting in the same spot for what appears to have been a very long time. It looks up at you slowly.
The Yeti emerges from a snowstorm that was not there a moment ago. You get the impression it brought the snowstorm with it.

minotaur.name: Minotaur
minotaur.title: The Labyrinth Lord
minotaur.description: A terrifying half-man half-bull that haunts ancient labyrinths, feeding on those who dare enter.
encounter_situations: You hear the Minotaur before you see it. When you find it, it has excavated a small clearing out of sheer stubbornness. There was no particular reason to do this.
The Minotaur is standing very still in a way that suggests it recently decided to stand still and is fully committed to this choice.
A Minotaur that is significantly larger than it needs to be blocks your way, looking at you with an expression that might be a challenge or might just be how it looks.

kitsune_9.name: Kitsune
kitsune_9.title: The Nine-Tailed Sovereign
kitsune_9.description: A fully awakened nine-tailed fox spirit of immense power, capable of reshaping reality with its tails.
encounter_situations: The nine-tailed fox is doing something with light and shadow that shouldn't be possible with only nine tails. When it notices you, all nine stop at once.
A Kitsune of nine tails is watching you from multiple angles simultaneously. This is not a metaphor. It is physically in several places at once.
The air smells like foxfire and old magic. The nine-tailed Kitsune is sitting precisely where you were about to step, looking at you with eyes that have seen everything twice.

dragon.name: Dragon
dragon.title: The Apex Predator
dragon.description: The pinnacle of predatory evolution, a creature of immense power that has ruled skies since the dawn of time.
encounter_situations: The Dragon is there in the same way that mountains are there — as if it has been there since before the ground beneath it was a choice.
You smell the Dragon before you see it. When you see it, you understand why — the Dragon is at rest, which for a Dragon looks like barely organized power.
The Dragon opens one eye. Then the other. It was sleeping. It is no longer sleeping. It regards you with the patience of something that has a great deal of time.

kraken.name: Kraken
kraken.title: The Deep Terror
kraken.description: An incomprehensible leviathan of the deepest trenches whose mere surfacing causes catastrophic waves.
encounter_situations: The water is still until it isn't. The Kraken surfaces slowly, like it's considering whether you're worth the effort of surfacing for.
Tentacles first. A great deal of tentacles. The Kraken assesses you with several eyes simultaneously.
You notice the Kraken by the absence of sound beneath the ice. Then the ice cracks in a very specific pattern.

hydra.name: Hydra
hydra.title: The Undying Serpent
hydra.description: A multi-headed serpent that grows two new heads for every one cut off, making it nearly impossible to defeat.

evolution.description: The Hydra grew its tentacles back one too many times, and they became something else.

encounter_situations: The Hydra is arguing with itself. Two of its heads are in disagreement about something, while the third watches you arrive with what might be relief.
A Hydra emerges from the frozen water and shakes itself, sending ice in all directions. One head notices you immediately. The others take a moment.
The Hydra is trying something. Three heads, one plan, unclear if they've agreed on what the plan is. You interrupt this process.

fenrir.name: Fenrir
fenrir.title: The World Eater
fenrir.description: The apocalyptic wolf of Norse legend, bound by the gods themselves for fear of what it would consume.
encounter_situations: The Fenrir is sitting very still, which is unusual for something that large. It watches you approach. The wind changes direction when it exhales.
You find the Fenrir by the sound of ice cracking that has no business being in a forest. When you find it, it is simply there, as if it has always been.
A Fenrir materializes from shadow the way smoke materializes from fire — you couldn't point to when it started. It looks at you steadily.

charybdis.name: Charybdis
charybdis.title: The Maelstrom
charybdis.description: A nautical nightmare that creates unstoppable whirlpools capable of swallowing entire fleets.
encounter_situations: The water spirals before the Charybdis appears. When it does appear, the spiral continues, rotating slowly around it.
Something enormous is moving just below the ice. The Charybdis breaks through from below, regarding you with calm, ancient eyes.
The Charybdis surfaces in the stillest part of the water, where nothing was moving, which you now understand was the warning.

leviathan.name: Leviathan
leviathan.title: The Sea Sovereign
leviathan.description: The primordial sea monster of ancient scripture, so vast it can encircle the entire world.
encounter_situations: The Leviathan emerges from water that shouldn't be deep enough to contain it. Physics, apparently, is a suggestion.
You find the Leviathan at the deepest point of the Hollows, in water so cold it's almost solid. It turns toward you the way tides turn.
The Leviathan has been still for long enough that ice has begun to form around it. When it moves, the ice breaks in all directions at once.

singularity.name: Singularity
singularity.title: The Galaxy Slime
singularity.description: A cosmic slime containing an entire galaxy within its gelatinous form, born from the first moment of creation.

divine_passive.passive_desc: At the start of battle, reduces all enemy speed by 15% for 3 turns.

astraea.name: Astraea
astraea.title: The Star Weaver
astraea.description: The divine weaver who stitches the fabric of reality from threads of pure starlight.

divine_passive.passive_desc: Each turn, restores 8% mana automatically — Astraea never runs dry.

chronos.name: Chronos
chronos.title: The Epoch Hare
chronos.description: The divine hare who governs the flow of time itself, wearing a crown of moons and carrying the universe's clock.

divine_passive.passive_desc: 20% chance each turn to act twice. Time is a suggestion.

aetherius.name: Aetherius
aetherius.title: The Void Whale
aetherius.description: An incomprehensible void whale that swims through the space between dimensions, consuming dead stars.

divine_passive.passive_desc: Heals 12% of all damage dealt back as HP. The void gives back what it takes.

genesis.name: Genesis
genesis.title: The Origin Phoenix
genesis.description: The first phoenix, born at the exact moment of creation, carrying the flame that sparked all life.

divine_passive.passive_desc: On KO: restores 30% HP and clears all status effects. Once per battle.

terminus.name: Terminus
terminus.title: The End-Time Owl
terminus.description: The solemn owl who watches over the final moments of all things, its eyes containing every ending.

divine_passive.passive_desc: Ultimates deal +40% damage (instead of +80%). But they always apply a status effect.

paradox.name: Paradox
paradox.title: The Mirror Sphinx
paradox.description: A sphinx that exists simultaneously in all possible realities, asking questions that have no answers.

divine_passive.passive_desc: 15% chance any attack reflects 50% of damage back to the attacker.

horizon.name: Horizon
horizon.title: The Rift Griffin
horizon.description: A griffin that soars along the edges of reality itself, tearing rifts between dimensions with its talons.

divine_passive.passive_desc: Ignores type disadvantage — Horizon exists outside the elemental chart.

karma.name: Karma
karma.title: The Weaver Cat
karma.description: A celestial cat that weaves the threads of fate, ensuring every action receives its due consequence.

divine_passive.passive_desc: When hit by a status effect, 40% chance the effect bounces to the attacker instead.

zodiac.name: Zodiac
zodiac.title: The Constellation Stag
zodiac.description: A majestic stag whose antlers form the constellations of the night sky, guiding lost souls home.

divine_passive.passive_desc: Attack and speed increase by 5% each turn, cumulatively. The stars align slowly.

abyss.name: Abyss
abyss.title: The Dark Matter Panther
abyss.description: A panther composed entirely of dark matter, invisible to all senses except the primal feeling of dread.

divine_passive.passive_desc: 25% chance each attack inflicts Blind — enemy moves have 30% miss chance for 2 turns.

nebula.name: Nebula
nebula.title: The Cloud Serpent
nebula.description: A serpent of interstellar gas and dust from which new stars are born within its coiling body.

divine_passive.passive_desc: Starts battle with a shield absorbing 20% of max HP in damage before HP drops.

supernova.name: Supernova
supernova.title: The Star-Burst Lion
supernova.description: A lion born from the death of a star, carrying the explosive energy of a supernova in every strike.

divine_passive.passive_desc: Every missed crit charges Critical Mass. At 3 charges: guaranteed crit that deals +200% damage.

nirvana.name: Nirvana
nirvana.title: The Lotus Koi
nirvana.description: A transcendent koi that has achieved perfect enlightenment, swimming through waters of pure consciousness.

divine_passive.passive_desc: Immune to all status effects. Some things are simply too at peace to be troubled.

asgard.name: Asgard
asgard.title: The Bifrost Wolf
asgard.description: A divine wolf that runs across the rainbow bridge between realms, carrying messages of the gods.

divine_passive.passive_desc: When HP drops below 50%, gains +30% attack and +20% speed for the rest of the battle.

atlas.name: Atlas
atlas.title: The Shell-Shocked Turtle
atlas.description: The ancient cosmic turtle upon whose shell entire worlds rest, slow but utterly indestructible.

divine_passive.passive_desc: Reduces all incoming damage by a flat 25%. Atlas has carried worse.

prismite.name: Prismite
prismite.title: The Architect's First Idea
prismite.description: A tiny floating kitten built from smooth porcelain-like shapes, with glowing golden diamond eyes and a halo that never quite stops turning. Prism shaped it to find out whether order could be gentle — so far, it has decided yes.
prismite.starter_flavor: Cool, composed, and quietly precise. Prismite doesn't rush — it simply doesn't need to.
encounter_situations: Prismite is sitting beside the path, arranging small crystals into a structure only it understands. It looks up at you with those diamond eyes.
The small porcelain cat is watching a beam of light refract through ice. When it notices you, it stands immediately — composed, as if it always knew you were coming.
Prismite appears at the edge of your vision, precise and deliberate. It doesn't approach until it decides the approach is worth making.

twine.name: Twine
twine.title: The Loom's First Memory
twine.description: A chubby little hamster woven out of glowing crimson thread, with a tiny clock gear ticking softly on its back like a shell. Twine carries the very first thread the Loom ever spun — which is why, sometimes, it seems to know what happens a few seconds before it does.
twine.starter_flavor: Quick, curious, and always one step ahead. Twine doesn't predict the future so much as politely insist on it.
encounter_situations: Twine is already running before you see it — a blur of crimson and clockwork, stopping only when it reaches you as if you were the destination all along.
The small hamster is sitting very still, clock-gear spinning slowly on its back. It's paying attention to something a few seconds ahead of you.
Twine materializes beside you in the middle of your step, as if it has always been there and you simply failed to notice. Its gear ticks once.

gloop.name: Gloop
gloop.title: The Aspect's First Question
gloop.description: A bouncy, translucent slime blob shifting through pastel pink and blue galaxy colors, filled with swirling star glitter. Aspect made Gloop to test whether change could be safe — Gloop has spent its whole existence cheerfully proving the answer is yes, over and over, in a slightly different shape each time.
gloop.starter_flavor: Soft, adaptable, and impossible to truly surprise. Gloop has already been a dozen shapes today and isn't finished.
encounter_situations: A small galaxy-colored slime is attempting to be everything at once in a two-foot radius. It settles into a roughly spherical shape when you approach, looking pleased.
Gloop is flowing very slowly toward something you can't identify, the swirling starlight in its body tracking some unseen current. It redirects toward you.
The small slime has changed color three times since you noticed it. When it settles on the color of the sky at a specific time of evening, it stops moving and looks at you.

barkley.name: Barkley
barkley.title: The Pillar's First Promise
barkley.description: A stubby little bark-and-moss dragon hatchling who still wears its golden eggshell like a tiny helmet, refusing to take it off. Pillar shaped Barkley to prove that steadiness didn't have to be boring — Barkley has never once let anyone down, and never plans to start.
barkley.starter_flavor: Loyal, sturdy, and stubbornly cheerful. Barkley moves slowly because Barkley has never needed to move fast.
encounter_situations: Barkley is sitting on the path wearing its eggshell helmet, looking at you with the complete confidence of something that has decided the world is basically fine.
The small dragon hatchling was in the middle of a determined charge toward nothing in particular. It redirects toward you without breaking pace.
Barkley is already sitting beside where you stop, as if it anticipated where you would pause. Its eggshell helmet tilts slightly.

centry.name: Centry
centry.title: The Boundary Guardian
centry.description: A proud guardian that stands watch at the borders between realms, half beast and half something older — a living checkpoint the Loom placed and forgot to remove.
encounter_situations: The Centry is standing at the edge of something — a biome boundary, a change in the light, some invisible line that matters to it. It watches you cross it.
A Centry turns when you approach, marking the border between where you were and where you're going with its presence. It seems to find this satisfying.
You find the Centry mid-patrol of a route you can't quite make sense of. It stops, regards you, then decides you're not a threat to whatever it's protecting.

wisp.name: Wisp
wisp.title: The Forgotten Flicker
wisp.description: A tiny drifting ball of pale light that hums faintly when happy. Faintly warm to the touch. Nobody knows what it used to be.

evolution.description: The Wisp found something worth lighting the way toward. It got brighter.

encounter_situations: A Wisp bobs gently at eye level, about three feet in front of you. It drifts left. It drifts right. It seems to be trying to show you something.
The Wisp is sitting completely still on the tip of a branch, humming to itself at a frequency you can almost hear. It notices you noticing it.
Something small and warm bumps into your ankle. The Wisp looks up at you as if this was your fault.

mudpup.name: Mudpup
mudpup.title: The Happy Disaster
mudpup.description: A round, perpetually delighted muddy amphibian that leaves a trail wherever it goes and seems genuinely proud of this.
encounter_situations: A Mudpup is sitting in the middle of the path looking extremely pleased about something. There is no obvious reason. You check.
The Mudpup has gotten itself stuck between two roots and is handling this with remarkable calm. It wiggles at you enthusiastically when you approach.
Splashing sounds, then a Mudpup rockets out of a puddle, bounces twice, and lands in front of you. It shakes mud everywhere. It does not apologize.

strix.name: Strix
strix.title: The Watcher in the Dark
strix.description: A tiny owl with unsettlingly large amber eyes that sees things a few seconds before they happen. Does not share this information.
encounter_situations: The Strix is staring at a spot just to your left. Not at you — next to you. When you look, there is nothing there yet.
A Strix lands silently on a branch directly above the path. It watches you pass with enormous eyes. You feel like you were expected.
The Strix has its eyes closed. This is more unsettling than the alternative. It opens them when you get close enough, as if it knew exactly when to.

kelpie.name: Kelpie
kelpie.title: The River's Lure
kelpie.description: A sleek horse-shaped beast woven from rushing water that seems very interested in whether you'd like to go for a ride. You should not.
encounter_situations: A Kelpie stands at the river's edge, looking at you over its shoulder with an expression that clearly means come on. The water is deep. The Kelpie looks friendly. These facts are related.
The Kelpie is already beside you. You didn't hear it approach. It presses its nose toward your hand, patient and gentle. Maren would tell you not to touch it.
A shape in the shallows resolves into a Kelpie standing very still, watching you. Its mane moves like the surface of water. It seems to be deciding something about you.

manticore.name: Manticore
manticore.title: The Three-Part Threat
manticore.description: Lion body, bat wings, scorpion tail. Each part appears to have a separate opinion on what to do next. The lion usually wins.
encounter_situations: The Manticore is sitting in the middle of the path, tail curled around itself, looking like it is waiting for someone specifically. You wonder if that is you.
A low rumble from the undergrowth. The Manticore steps out wing-first, then body, then finally the tail, which seems reluctant to commit to the confrontation.
The Manticore lands in front of you with its wings half-folded, head lowered, tail raised. Three things ready to happen. You have a moment to decide which one.

will_o_wisp.name: Will-o-Wisp
will_o_wisp.title: The Misleading Guide
will_o_wisp.description: A larger, brighter cousin of the Wisp. Leads travelers in perfect circles with genuine enthusiasm and absolutely no malice. It believes it's helping.
encounter_situations: The Will-o-Wisp drifts ahead of you on the path, then pauses, pulsing softly, as if waiting. It seems to want you to follow. The path behind it does not go where you are going.
A warm glow bobs between the trees, cheerful and consistent. The Will-o-Wisp orbits you once, then drifts off in the wrong direction. It looks back.
The Will-o-Wisp is leading something else in circles. It notices you noticing this. It does not appear to understand the problem.

rukh.name: Rukh
rukh.title: The Sky Sovereign
rukh.description: A bird large enough to blot out the sun when it passes overhead. Prefers solitude but will assist a trainer it finds worthy. The standards are high.
encounter_situations: The sky darkens. You look up. The Rukh is directly overhead, descending slowly, measuring something about you from a height you cannot judge.
A shadow falls across everything at once. The Rukh lands thirty feet away and folds its wings deliberately, each fold taking several seconds. It then looks at you.
You heard something massive. You see the Rukh already perched on a rock that should not support it, watching you with one enormous eye. You are being considered.

glacius.name: Glacius
glacius.title: The Patient One
glacius.description: A wolf-bear hybrid encased in living ice that has been moving toward something for centuries. It has not arrived yet. It does not seem concerned.
encounter_situations: A shape in the snow that you thought was a boulder turns out to be a Glacius, which has been sitting still long enough to collect frost on its frost. It opens one eye.
The Glacius is moving. Very slowly. In a very specific direction. It does not acknowledge you, but when you step into its path it waits with an expression of geological patience.
Frozen breath clouds the air before you see the Glacius. It is sitting in the exact center of a clearing, perfectly still, radiating cold. It has been there a long time.

behemoth.name: Behemoth
behemoth.title: The Immovable
behemoth.description: A mountain-sized beast that has simply decided it is not moving today. Or tomorrow. Occasionally sighs in a way that registers on instruments.
encounter_situations: The thing you thought was a hill has eyes. The Behemoth looks at you the way mountains look at things — it doesn't, really, but it knows you're there.
The Behemoth is standing in the middle of something it has apparently decided to stand in the middle of. It sighs once. The ground vibrates.
You walked past it twice before you realized. The Behemoth has been watching you the whole time, still as stone, with the deep calm of something that has never needed to hurry.

wendigo.name: Wendigo
wendigo.title: The Hunger That Walks
wendigo.description: A gaunt towering creature of permanent winter. Not malicious — simply always starving, and very fast. The cold it carries is its own.
encounter_situations: The temperature drops before the Wendigo appears. Then it is simply there, at the edge of your vision, too tall, too still, watching with eyes like frozen breath.
The Wendigo steps out of the treeline on legs that seem too long. It lowers its head to look at you directly. This is the politest version of this encounter.
Something has been following you at a distance for several minutes. When it finally steps into the open, the Wendigo looks almost relieved to be seen.

jormungandr.name: Jormungandr
jormungandr.title: The World Serpent
jormungandr.description: The sea-serpent vast enough to encircle the world and bite its own tail. It is aware of the irony. It has had time to think about it.
encounter_situations: A ring appears in the water around you before you understand what you're looking at. The Jormungandr rises slowly, taking its time, the coils already in place.
The Jormungandr's head emerges from the deep directly ahead, larger than you expected, moving with the patience of something that has nowhere urgent to be. It regards you.
A shape under the surface resolves, slowly, into something that is coiled around an area the size of a field. The Jormungandr surfaces one eye first.

simurgh.name: Simurgh
simurgh.title: The Ancient Witness
simurgh.description: A luminous bird old enough to have witnessed three world destructions. Remarkably calm about it. Carries the knowledge of everything that has ever ended.
encounter_situations: The Simurgh lands without sound and folds wings of light around itself like a cloak. It looks at you the way something looks at something it has seen before, a long time ago, in a different context.
A warmth from above. The Simurgh descends through the clouds in a long unhurried spiral, bright enough to look at directly if you are careful. It settles nearby and waits.
The Simurgh has been sitting on that rock for longer than the rock has been there. It doesn't move when you approach. It was expecting you. It has been expecting you for a while.
